extract: Inkay (Japanese: マーイーカ Maaiika) is a dual-type Dark/Psychic Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Malamar starting at level 30 when leveled up while the game system is held upside-down. When playing on the Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2, this can only be done in handheld mode and while no other controllers are connected, using the orientation of the attached Joy-Con controllers.
